goal: Make provider production eligibility explicit before any real provider execution can be considered.
risk: AOF may imply production provider safety from structural approval and outcome artifacts.
loss_boundary: No v9.2 release claim without production-boundary audit, product-value evidence, release-state gate, and explicit not-proven boundary.
evidence_plan: schema, writer, audit, Mission Control projection, tests, docs, Council review
stop_conditions: Stop if production execution is authorized by v9.2
Stop if credential, budget, revocation, rollback, monitoring, incident, or human go/no-go boundary is missing
